name: Shadow Contrast Profile (4x Upscale)
description: Transform your photo into a dramatic black-and-white cinematic studio portrait with high-contrast side lighting + fast 4x upscale (2 credits)

default_prompts.image_edit: Image A = identity source. Task: Generate a true photorealistic black-and-white studio portrait using the EXACT face from Image A. ABSOLUTE FACE LOCK (NON-NEGOTIABLE): The face must be directly derived from Image A with no changes. Preserve exact geometry: face shape, jawline, cheekbones, forehead, chin. Preserve exact eyes, nose, lips, spacing, proportions. Preserve exact hairstyle, hairline, density, texture. Preserve exact beard/mustache shape and thickness (if present). DO NOT: redesign the face, beautify, stylize, or modify features, change proportions or structure, blend with any other face. If any conflict occurs, IGNORE all other instructions and keep Image A face unchanged. IDENTITY REQUIREMENT: The output must look like the SAME PERSON as Image A (recognizable immediately). Composition: Near-frontal studio portrait, chest-up, torso slightly turned (10–20°), both shoulders visible, head slightly angled, direct eye contact with intense expression. Clothing: Dark button-up shirt, top button undone, collar open in relaxed V-shape. Lighting: Dark background, cinematic side lighting shaping the face while keeping both shoulders visible. Photorealism: real skin texture, pores, imperfections, natural hair strands, realistic fabric folds, correct proportions from Image A. Lens: 85–100mm portrait look, shallow depth of field, sharp focus on eyes, HDR clarity, monochrome. STRICT OUTPUT RULE: This is a face-preservation task, NOT a face-generation task.
default_prompts.upscale: Ultra high-resolution black-and-white studio portrait, cinematic side lighting, razor-sharp eye focus, film-grade monochrome, skin pore detail, 8K, HDR
